evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks how to write a job description
evals.prompt: Help me write a job description for a senior software engineer role

evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about sourcing candidates
evals.prompt: We are struggling to find senior ML engineers. What sourcing channels should we use?

evals.description: Agent can design a structured interview loop
evals.prompt: Design an interview loop for a product manager role at a Series B startup

evals.description: Agent provides structured offer management guidance
evals.prompt: A candidate finished their final round yesterday. How do I run the offer process?

evals.description: Agent provides recruiting funnel metrics guidance
evals.prompt: What metrics should I track to know if my recruiting pipeline is healthy?
Our interviewers just have free-form conversations with candidates. Is that OK?

evals.description: Agent generates an inclusive job description checklist
evals.prompt: How do I make sure my job description is inclusive and not discouraging underrepresented candidates?

evals.description: Agent provides closing tactics for reluctant candidates
evals.prompt: A candidate got our offer but seems hesitant and has not responded in 4 days. How do I close them?

evals.description: Agent recommends multi-channel sourcing, not single-channel
evals.prompt: We only post on LinkedIn and hope for applicants. Is that a good strategy?

evals.description: Agent explains employer brand building tactics
evals.prompt: How do we build an employer brand to attract better candidates passively?

evals.description: Agent does not trigger for performance management questions
evals.prompt: One of my engineers is underperforming. How do I put them on a PIP?

evals.description: Agent references job-description-templates.md for detailed templates
evals.prompt: Give me a full job description template I can use for a marketing hire
